## 📋 Checklist

## SVG parity (Stage 6)
- [ ] If this PR touches series, overlays, plugins, or export code: `pnpm test:svg-parity` passes.
- [ ] If adding a new `SeriesType` or export feature: `svg-parity.json` updated.
